name: Nameless King
description: A 2D topdown game we made during the GDG game dev event built using Godot. This is a story driven game you play as a forgotten nameless king taking back his kingdom with some time travel elements

name: The Human Nutrition Unit
Stack: Nextjs - TypeScript - React - TailwindCSS - PayloadCms - PostgresSQL
description: The Human Nutrition Unit is a nutrition research centre at the University of Auckland, conducting clinical studies to improve health outcomes through evidence-based research. This project redesigned HNU's website into a modern, responsive platform with an integrated content management system, making it easier for participants to discover studies and staff to manage website content independently.

name: A Knights Tragedy
description: A 2D platformer game we made during the GDG game with story elements

name: QR Code Generator
description: Created a QR-Code generator app using nextjs and tailwindcss as its frontend. The backend is created in a python web service deployed on render which handes the requests
